metadata.question: What time is shown on the left display of the red chess clock behind the board? Format the answer as a time with a colon (e.g., 1.23).

expected:
I have done a tour of duty at all of BigTech: engineers & designers have more autonomy here to execute than any place on Earth.

In fact, the environment is the opposite of what you’re suggesting: the people most successful here are the ones most comfortable debating decisions.
predicted: Engineers and designers at X have more autonomy than at any BigTech, and success favors those comfortable debating decisions.

metadata.question:
I have done a tour of duty at all of BigTech: engineers & designers have more autonomy here to execute than any place on Earth.

In fact, the environment is the opposite of what you’re suggesting: the people most successful here are the ones most comfortable debating decisions.
What handwritten number appears near the upper left corner of the card? Format the answer as a single digit (e.g., 7).
What is the alphanumeric code printed on the tan half of the capsule? Output the exact text (e.g., "A123").
What is the tire size printed directly to the right of the top-left "MICHELIN" brand name? Output the exact text as printed (e.g., 205/55 R 16).
What country is printed inside the oval directly below the words "MADE IN" on the bottom tire? Output the exact text as printed (e.g., GERMANY).
What is the total price for the Icon Room, explicitly stated to include taxes & fees? Output the answer exactly as printed, including the dollar sign.
According to the "Surroundings" list on the right side of the page, what is the exact distance in feet to the Richmond Night Market? Output the answer as a single integer without units.
What is the numerical customer review rating out of 10 displayed in the blue circle on the right side of the page? Output the answer as a decimal number.
What is the license plate number on the vehicle? Format the answer as a continuous sequence of uppercase letters and digits with no spaces (e.g., ABC1234).
